closed_world.quote: Susan lived in government housing, so everyone was somehow connected to the military.

investigator.value: Susan, a navy wife experiencing strange thoughts/mental programming
investigator.quote: Stay on target. The mission comes first.

red_herring.value: Construction noise and DSL interference suggested as mundane explanations for Susan's strange mental episodes
red_herring.quote: Maybe it was that construction up the street? You could be right. Now we don't even have phones to complain with.

clue_fairness.value: Susan's internal mission-focused thoughts are presented directly to reader as they occur
clue_fairness.quote: Stay on target. The mission comes first. She had to get these thoughts out of head

social_world.value: Military hierarchy and naval officer culture, with government housing creating insular community structure
social_world.quote: Susan lived in government housing, so everyone was somehow connected to the military.

reveal_mechanic.value: Programming or conditioning triggered by specific audio frequencies, revealed through Susan's involuntary responses
reveal_mechanic.quote: people responding strangely to different combinations of light and sounds
